name: Eggplant Yeast Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 Large Eggplant, peeled & cut into 1/4 inch thick rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and onions; sauté for 5 minutes.
3. Stir in tamari and half the garlic, basil, and salt.
4. In a small pot, combine flour and nutritional yeast with water, tahini, and the remaining seasonings. Mix well.
5. Cook on low heat, stirring frequently until the sauce thickens. Add more liquid if needed.
6. Oil an 8 x 12 inch baking dish.
7. Layer sauce, sliced eggplant, and onions in the dish, repeating until finished with sauce on top.
8. Sprinkle paprika over the layers.
9. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
